title: Campfire Resting
description: Change the time at a campfire like in The Legend of Zelda!
body:
![(campfirerestingtitle)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c75e8202b68f20e3e8cc526ecfd5d676de42849d.png)

# Campfire Resting

By right clicking on a lit campfire, a GUI will pop up and you can change the time of day! There may also be a 1 in 10 chance to have back pain when you wake up. It's a really simple mod and doesn't add any new blocks. Any and all feedback is welcome. Thanks!

# Added

- Campfire GUI for regular and soul variants
- Cooldown gamerule
- Weather gamerule
- Cooldown Reset Command
- Chance of Backpain


![Campfire GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k9O8NrbO/images/769cd8f7473f2d59ea3cbad38a82e100888480e8.png)

# FAQ

**Will you port this to fabric?**
> Likely not, it's a whole process to remake the mod in something I am clueless about.

**Will you port this to version _____ ?**
> Nope, I plan on keeping the mod up to date with the latest version of Forge/Neoforge whenever I can.

**My day counter resets when I use the mod?**
> Really sorry about this one, I'm not too sure of a fix for this as the mod works by using in game time commands.

*Sorry for the inconvience, I hope you can understand*



# Extra

Thanks a ton to MCreator!

Now uploaded to modrith too :-)
